checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Recommendation for Employment: Biodata/ Personal Data Sheet – 1 original copy
Referrals of Indigents: Certificate of Indigency
Referrals of Indigents: Hospital Bill (if patient is/ was confined)
checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Hospital where the patient is/ was confined

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: DFA Assistance: Any government issued ID – 1 photocopy
checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Requesting party/ applicant or Any government agency (PSA, Comelec, LTO, DSWD, PhilPost, GSIS, SSS, etc.)

internal_services.who_may_avail: Couples, contracting parties or their immediate family members

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to the Lipa City Mayor’s Office and request for schedule
steps.agency_action: 1. Set the schedule and advice the couple to be back on the scheduled date
steps.person_responsible: Senior Administrative Assistant III (Lipa City Mayor’s Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to the Lipa City Mayor’s Office for the briefing before the ceremony
steps.agency_action: 1. Confirm the schedule of the City Mayor
